metadata.title: Freelance Web Designer & Developer based in Italy · Websites, e-commerce, development, SEO, WordPress | Federico Calicchia
metadata.description: Freelance Web Designer & Developer based in Italy. Websites, e-commerce, custom development, SEO, WordPress maintenance. Working with Italian and European businesses, in English. One contact, full stack, no agency middlemen.
metadata.ogTitle: Freelance Web Designer & Developer based in Italy
metadata.ogDescription: Freelance web designer and developer based in Italy. Websites, e-commerce, development, SEO, WordPress maintenance. Italy + international, one contact.

hero.meta:
Based in Italy.
Working with European, UK, and US businesses.
hero.pitch:
{years}+ years designing websites, e-commerce and digital systems for professionals who do not have time to manage a six-person agency.
No agency, one single contact.

portrait.portraitAlt: Federico Calicchia, Freelance Web Designer & Developer — studio portrait in Ceccano
portrait.h2:
Freelance Web Designer & Developer
for people who do not have time to manage
a six-person agency.
portrait.bio:
Freelance web designer and developer since 2016.
Studio in Ceccano (FR), clients across Italy and beyond.
No agency, no hand-offs, no blame shifting.
I design, build and keep the site running after launch.
One contact.

trust.subtitle: Verified Google reviews
trust.h2: Don't trust me. Trust the people who already picked me.

howIWork.lead:
My five pillars are not a slogan.
They are the rules I use to make decisions every day.
Below, the five phases where those principles become concrete work on your project.

details.title: Obsessed with details
details.body:
Every pixel has a reason. Every millisecond counts.
If it does not feel right, I redo it.
That is the difference between a site that opens and a site that sells.

ahead.title: One step ahead
ahead.body:
Tech changes every month.
I study, test, discard.
What ends up in your project has already been through the wringer. You are not the testing ground.

crossSkills.title: Cross-discipline skills
crossSkills.body:
Design, development, SEO, performance, copy.
Not three different people. One.
That means consistent decisions and no "not my department".

oneContact.title: One single contact
oneContact.body:
No project managers, no hand-offs.
You write me, I answer.
A simple request gets a mockup within 48 hours.

results.title: Results, not promises
results.body:
Numbers you can verify: load time, Google rankings, conversions.
Niente "we are creative" pitch.
Only what gets measured counts.

brief.label: Brief
brief.title: I listen.
brief.body:
A 30-minute call to understand who you are, what you sell, and why a client should pick you.
No agency-style questionnaires, no off-the-shelf decisions.

strategy.label: Strategy
strategy.title: I draft the plan.
strategy.body:
I pick structure, tone, palette and stack.
I explain why in ten minutes. No philosophy.
The plan is written, shared, editable.

design.label: Design
design.title: Pixels carry weight.
design.body:
Interactive mockups, not static frames.
Vedi le animazioni, ascolti come si muove.
Cambiamo prima di scrivere codice — quando costa zero sistemare.

build.label: Build
build.title: I build it well.
build.body:
Modern stack, obsessive performance, SEO wired in from day one.
Every line has a reason.
Internal review: I write, I re-read, I break it to rebuild it cleaner.

launch.label: Launch
launch.title: I fix, I test, I ship.
launch.body:
Tests on ten real devices, analytics monitoring, a 30-minute training session.
Poi un anno di assistenza inclusa — perché i siti veri vivono dopo il lancio.

worksHorizontal.h2: Things I built for people who needed them.

skillsGravity.subtitleDefault:
Technical craft sharpened with AI for outcomes you can measure.
Drag them, throw them — they always settle back where they belong.
skillsGravity.resetAriaLabel: Reset the tools to their starting position
